+    [Parameter]

## Summary

The bug was in `/testbed/src/BootstrapBlazor/Components/BaseComponents/DynamicElement.cs`. The fix involved two aspects:

### 1. Revert `IDisposeAsync` implementation
- Removed the `IAsyncDisposable` interface from the class declaration
- Removed the `DisposeAsync(bool)` and `DisposeAsync()` methods (along with their XML documentation comments)
- The class now extends only `BootstrapComponentBase` instead of `BootstrapComponentBase, IAsyncDisposable`

### 2. Add `OnTouchStart`/`OnTouchEnd` parameters
- Added `TriggerTouchStart` (bool, default false) and `OnTouchStart` (`Func<TouchEventArgs, Task>?`) parameters
- Added `TriggerTouchEnd` (bool, default false) and `OnTouchEnd` (`Func<TouchEventArgs, Task>?`) parameters
- Added rendering logic in `BuildRenderTree` for `ontouchstart` and `ontouchend` events, including event prevent default and stop propagation attributes
- Added helper methods `IsTriggerTouchStart()`, `IsTriggerTouchEnd()`, `OnTriggerTouchStart()`, and `OnTriggerTouchEnd()`
- Updated the `OpenElement`/`CloseElement` conditions in `BuildRenderTree` to also consider touch triggers
